overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval harbor village at night, passing wooden longships and campfires, then transitioning into a dark forest path. The scene features atmospheric lighting with fire sources illuminating the dark surroundings as the character moves from the settlement into the wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor village with wooden longships and stone buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the harbor village past wooden ships and stone buildings

notable_agents.action: villager sitting near a small campfire
villager standing near wooden dock structure

entered.detail: large wooden Viking-style ship with curved hull beached on the shore
small stone building with lit windows and thatched roof
wooden plank walkway extending toward the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a medieval harbor village at night, passing wooden longships beached on the left and stone buildings on the right. The area is dimly lit by ambient firelight, with NPC villagers visible near the structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with large ceremonial campfire

events.description: approaching large central campfire, firelight becomes the dominant illumination
character turns left around the campfire toward the forest path

agents.ego_description: turning away from the village campfire toward the dark forest path

notable_agents.action: villager warming hands at the large campfire
villager walking toward the fire pit

entered.detail: tall bonfire with flames and smoke rising, providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large central campfire where villagers gather for warmth, then turns left to exit the village. The firelight casts dramatic shadows as the character transitions from the open village center toward the dark tree line.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with stone walls and dense pine trees

events.description: exiting village and entering dense forest path with stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking along narrow forest path surrounded by dense trees and stone walls

entered.detail: low stone wall running alongside the path
tall pine trees forming a dense canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark forest path flanked by stone walls and dense pine trees. The lighting drops significantly as the canopy blocks the sky, creating an enclosed, mysterious atmosphere with no other people visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep forest path approaching distant clearing

events.description: passing wooden cart abandoned on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dark forest, approaching a distant clearing with faint lights

entered.detail: abandoned wooden cart with wheels sitting beside the path
snow-capped mountain peak visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues deeper into the forest where the trees become denser and the path darker. An abandoned wooden cart appears on the left, and distant mountains become visible through the canopy as the path curves toward a faintly lit clearing ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit medieval harbor village into the oppressive depths of a dark forest. It begins by tracking the character past beached wooden longships and stone buildings, where ambient firelight illuminates the presence of nearby villagers. As the character approaches a large central campfire, the scene shifts from the open village center toward the tree line, with dramatic shadows stretching across the ground. The camera then follows the character into a forest path flanked by stone walls and dense pine trees, where the lighting drops significantly as the canopy closes overhead. Finally, the path curves deeper into the wilderness past an abandoned wooden cart, revealing distant mountains through the thick foliage as the character moves toward a faintly lit clearing.
